questionHtml:
What is a function of histones?


A.  Supercoiling of DNA during binary fission in prokaryotes

B.  Synthesis of proteins

C.  Formation of microtubules during mitosis

D.  Condensation of DNA

meta.title: What is a function of histones? A. Supercoiling of DNA during binary fission in prokaryotes B. Synthesis of proteins C. Formation of microtubules during mitosis D. Condensation of
